creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for the bug report!

I'm aware of the security update and issues with the FAM(due recent danfe@ update).

Patches are OK, but I have them in the tree already from (your) previous bug reports, so no need to stack them up.

One note - it's not a good practice to drop features, like 'lib/nss_wins.1' plugin just cause it doesn't compile from the first attempt. For the future, please try to provide workaround. Well, I have a working patch for this, so it's just a recommendation.

Thanks for your help and awareness!
